agent_raw: No methodological issue. The fold-local augmentation design prevents contamination: splits occur at the original-image level before augmentation, and augmentation is generated on-the-fly only in the training loop. Near-duplicate synthetic images exist only in training data. Physical-unit-level part clustering prevents same-unit originals from crossing boundaries. The final test set is raw later-week production data with no augmentation. The scope is correctly disclosed as specific to this camera setup and manufacturing process. Cross-factory generalization is not claimed. The evaluation is valid.
